revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang|1|2|3|4}} * '''1''' is the [[language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking; optional. * '''3''' is the text that may appear instead of 2; optional. * '''4''' is for additional texts as may be necessary; optional. :If neither 2 nor 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. ==See also== * {{tlx|Wikisourcelang-inline}} * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws}}—to place a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template * {{tlx|Wikisourcehas}}—for allowing the including editor to choose the wording * {{tlx|User Wikisource}}—a [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|Wikipedia userbox]] * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}}—a specialized template for redirecting to Wikisource * {{tlx|Wiktionarylang}}—analogous to Wikisourcelang, but designed for terms in foreign language [[Wiktionary]] sites * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]]—for full usage information and background * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sister projects#Wikisource]]—for full usage information {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang|1|2|3|4}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking; optional. * '''3''' is the text that may appear instead of 2; optional. * '''4''' is for additional texts as may be necessary; optional. :If neither 2 nor 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. ==See also== * {{tlx|Wikisourcelang-inline}} * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws}}—to place a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template * {{tlx|Wikisourcehas}}—for allowing the including editor to choose the wording * {{tlx|User Wikisource}}—a [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|Wikipedia userbox]] * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}}—a specialized template for redirecting to Wikisource * {{tlx|Wiktionarylang}}—analogous to Wikisourcelang, but designed for terms in foreign language [[Wiktionary]] sites * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]]—for full usage information and background * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sister projects#Wikisource]]—for full usage information {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang|1|2|3|4}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking; optional. * '''3''' is the text that may appear instead of 2; optional. * '''4''' is for additional texts as may be necessary; optional. :If neither 2 nor 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. ==See also== * {{tlx|Wikisourcelang-inline}} * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws}}—to place a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template * {{tlx|Wikisourcehas}}—for allowing the including editor to choose the wording * {{tlx|User Wikisource}}—a [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|Wikipedia userbox]] * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}}—a specialized template for redirecting to Wikisource * {{tlx|Wiktionarylang}}—analogous to Wikisourcelang, but designed for terms in foreign language [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] sites * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]]—for full usage information and background * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sister projects#Wikisource]]—for full usage information {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang|1|2|3|4}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking; optional. * '''3''' is the text that may appear instead of 2; optional. * '''4''' is for additional texts as may be necessary; optional. :If neither 2 nor 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. ==See also== * {{tlx|Wikisourcelang-inline}} * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws}}—to place a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template * {{tlx|Wikisourcehas}}—for allowing the including editor to choose the wording * {{tlx|User Wikisource}}—a [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|Wikipedia userbox]] * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}}—a specialized template for redirecting to Wikisource * {{tlx|Wiktionarylang}}—analogous to Wikisourcelang, but designed for terms in foreign language [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] sites * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]]—for full usage information and background * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sister projects#Wikisource]]—for full usage information {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang|1|2|3|4}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking; optional. * '''3''' is the text that may appear instead of 2; optional. * '''4''' is for additional texts as may be necessary; optional. :If neither 2 nor 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. ==See also== * {{tlx|Wikisourcelang-inline}} * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws}}—to place a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template * {{tlx|Wikisourcehas}}—for allowing the including editor to choose the wording * {{tlx|User Wikisource}}—a [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|Wikipedia userbox]] * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}}—a specialized template for redirecting to Wikisource * {{tlx|Wiktionarylang}}—analogous to Wikisourcelang, but designed for terms in foreign language [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] sites * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]]—for full usage information and background * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sister projects#Wikisource]]—for full usage information {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang|1|2|3|4}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking; optional. * '''3''' is the text that may appear instead of 2; optional. * '''4''' is for additional texts as may be necessary; optional. :If neither 2 nor 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. ==See also== * {{tlx|Wikisourcelang-inline}} * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws}}—to place a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template * {{tlx|Wikisourcehas}}—for allowing the including editor to choose the wording * {{tlx|User Wikisource}}—a [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|Wikipedia userbox]] * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}}—a specialized template for redirecting to Wikisource * {{tlx|Wiktionarylang}}—analogous to Wikisourcelang, but designed for terms in foreign language [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] sites * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]]—for full usage information and background * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sister projects#Wikisource]]—for full usage information {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang|1|2|3|4}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking; optional. * '''3''' is the text that may appear instead of 2; optional. * '''4''' is for additional texts as may be necessary; optional. :If neither 2 nor 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. ==See also== * {{tlx|Wikisourcelang-inline}} * {{tlx|wikisource}}—to create the sidebox * {{tlx|wikisource-inline}}—to create a list of sources on Wikisource among other options * {{tlx|cite wikisource}}—to create a full citation to wikisource * {{tlx|ws}}—to place a wikisource icon before text, or a link to wikisource, or another template * {{tlx|Wikisourcehas}}—for allowing the including editor to choose the wording * {{tlx|User Wikisource}}—a [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|Wikipedia userbox]] * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}}—a specialized template for redirecting to Wikisource * {{tlx|Wiktionarylang}}—analogous to Wikisourcelang, but designed for terms in foreign language [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] sites * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]]—for full usage information and background * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sister projects#Wikisource]]—for full usage information {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
